name: Airlines
blurb: Carrier strategy, financials, fleet decisions, leadership moves, mergers and turnarounds.

name: Airports
blurb: Terminal expansions, hub developments, ground ops, disruptions and passenger throughput.

name: Aircraft & Fleet
blurb: Boeing, Airbus and Embraer programs, orders, deliveries, retirements, engines and MRO.

name: Routes & Networks
blurb: New and dropped routes, schedules, frequencies, capacity and network strategy.

name: Safety & Regulation
blurb: Incidents, investigations, certification and FAA/EASA/ICAO rules and compliance.

name: Sustainability
blurb: Sustainable aviation fuel, emissions, electric and hydrogen flight and net-zero commitments.

name: Travel Technology
blurb: Booking platforms, NDC, biometrics, in-flight connectivity, AI and the cabin experience.

name: Industry & Business
blurb: Market data, finance, leasing, M&A, traffic figures and aviation economics.
